body_transformation: The Voltrorb's rounded body now features smooth, scale-covered skin in deep ocean blue with subtle teal undertones, replacing its original light gray texture. Its pointed ears are transformed into delicate, fin-like structures with pearly white edges and aquamarine glows along their edges. The curled tail tip elongates slightly into a streamlined shape with fin-like extensions, while the short stubby legs gain webbed feet with a seafoam green sheen. Gill slits appear along the neck area, blending seamlessly into the new scale pattern without altering the compact silhouette.
signature_feature: Tail fin: smooth, scale-covered fin with aquamarine glow and seafoam green edge highlights.
